Q8 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

The stress-strain curve of an ideal elasto-plastic material is given as

Correct answer: B
Solution

(b)
An ideal elasto-plastic material is one that experiences no work-hardening during plastic
deformation. Hence, the stress-strain curve on an ideal elasto-plastic material shows linear elastic properties upto the yield stress and then ideal plastic properties.
